translation.about: Computer Science graduate with 3+ years of experience in developing responsive web applications, scalable REST APIs, and mobile solutions. End-to-end experience, from solution design and architecture to implementation, deployment, and maintenance, with the ability to work across all areas of software development. Adaptable and analytical profile, with a fast learning curve for new technologies and challenges.

projects.tarefando: Mobile app for academic task tracking focused on primary education and tutoring
projects.imagePlayground: Web app that provides advanced digital image processing techniques
projects.viewer3d: DirectX app that provides 3D object transformations
